active_profile_source: S02 language profile plus S04/S05/S06 controls

checks: terminology first-use and consistency are enforceable
language profile is guidance not copied template

downstream_design_force: S10 writes with clear moves and terminology
Rendered gate checks language and terminology quality

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: forbidden claim wording or internal workflow residue permitted
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: language/move obligations too vague for high-quality manuscript
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local trace, label, or wording defect that does not alter authority
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: potential reviewer risk tracked without forced full rerun

anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR and WATCH findings enter local revision or risk ledger; they do not force full downstream rerun by default.
